abstract: Welcome to our first Milvus Community Meetup, sponsored by Zilliz! In this meetup, Frank Liu will talk about some of the latest features in the upcoming Milvus 2.1 release and Rishav Ray will be talking about how Milvus helps power real-time recommendation at Trell. New Features in Milvus 2.1 We'll first briefly go over some of the differences between Milvus 2.x and Milvus 1.x before talking about some of the latest features in the upcoming version of Milvus. Main Talk: Building a Real-Time Recommendation System with Milvus Ever wondered how YouTube suggested videos update instantaneously or how Amazon updates recommendations based on your previous clicks/searches? The secret lies in real-time recommendation systems - tech stacks that allow companies to personalize a user's suggestions based on their previous history. In this talk, Rishav will discuss how Milvus can be used to build such an end-to-end real-time recommendation system
title: Milvus Community Talks
